title: CallOutcome
description: FROZEN CONTRACT. Every call MUST terminate as exactly one of these terminal states. Referenced by quote.json. TEAM DECISION PENDING: packages/contracts/README.md lists a 4th status 'error'; this Phase 0 draft ships the 3 product endings (itemized_quote | callback_scheduled | declined). Resolve before final freeze. Do not add a status without telling the whole team.

status.description: The single terminal state of the call.

callback_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp for a scheduled callback.
